title: ERP-MES Core (ISA-95)
description: Canonical ISA-95 / IEC 62264 foundation for building ERP-MES products on ISPF: equipment/material/personnel models, process segments and work masters, work schedule -> job order -> job response with genealogy, quality gate, inventory documents, maintenance lite, shift calendar, OEE (ISO 22400) and idempotent verb x noun ERP transactions (Part 5). Industry-neutral core: assemble concrete MES/ERP systems as data overlays, no schema changes.
changelog: 1.1.1 - form heights calibrated to the real renderer - submit buttons no longer clipped on any operator tab; 1.1.0 - operator UI rework: flat widget format, dropdown selects from catalog reports, row-click autofill, KPI cards, event journal; +8 catalog reports (material/equipment/person/defect-type/reason-code/eventdef/shift/event-journal)

changelog.notes: 1.1.1: form heights calibrated to the real renderer - submit buttons no longer clipped on any operator tab
1.1.0: operator UI rework - flat dashboard widget format (no settingsJson), dropdown selects fed by catalog reports, row-click autofill into forms, KPI value cards, event journal report
Initial release: ISA-95 Parts 1-5 + ISO 22400 OEE subset, certified by ErpMesCoreIntegrationTest happy path
